items.description:
This Raggedy Shirt gives you that well-worn woodsguide look, perfect with our Woodsguide trousers below! 

You NEED this whimsical Pumpkin Scarecrow outfit in your inventory! A little scary but mostly magical, this costume will slay in all the top games this Halloween! The full look: 
- Pumpkin Scarecrow Outfit (Base) - https://www.roblox.com/bundles/907596/Pumpkin-Scarecrow
- Raggedy Shirt - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76665028444873/Shirt-PumpkinScarecrow
- Woodsguide Trousers - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/72258512491173/Pants-PumpkinScarecrow
- Scarecrow Hat - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/136500242016025/Hat-PumpkinScarecrow
- Fireflies Aura - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/112923968809107/Back-AuraFireFliesLeaves

items.name: Ralph Lauren Vintage Fit Fleece Graphic Sweatshirt
items.description: This cotton-blend sweatshirt features an athletic-inspired graphic on the front, which nods to our founding year – 1967. In addition to the distressed print, it is garment-dyed and washed for a timeworn look.
